title: emilia javanica
intro: Emilia javanica, also known as Thai signal plant or Chinese cigar flower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Emilia javanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or infuse in oils for topical application.
